message:
🌱 Add fluentd: CI: Some tests about signal handlers sometimes fail mission (#1767)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "fluentd-4063-ci-some-tests-about-signal-handlers-sometimes-fail",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "fluentd: CI: Some tests about signal handlers sometimes fail",
+    "description": "CI: Some tests about signal handlers sometimes fail. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current fluentd deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your fluentd version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n fluentd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluentd\nhelm list -n fluentd 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working fluentd installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review fluentd configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant fluentd configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n fluentd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluentd\nkubectl get configmap -n fluentd -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=fluentd\n```\n### Describe the bug\n\n`test_cont_in_main_process_signal_handlers` and `test_cont_in_supervisor_signal_handler` of `SupervisorTest` sometimes fail."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for CI: Some tests about signal handlers sometimes fail",
+        "description": "If it use the object applied `dont_allow` in the other test through `ObjectSpace.each_object`, it will cause the error.\nTo relax object constraints, this patch will use `never` instead.\n\nSee sample code in https://github.com/fluent/fluentd/issues/4063#issuecomment-2416121325\n```yaml\n===============================================================================\nFailure: test_cont_in_main_process_signal_handlers(SupervisorTest):\n  class()\n  Called 0 times.\n  Expected 1 times.\n/opt/hostedtoolcache/Ruby/3.0.5/x64/lib/ruby/gems/3.0.0/gems/sigdump-0.2.4/lib/sigdump.rb:74:in `block in dump_object_count'\n/opt/hostedtoolcache/Ruby/3.0.5/x64/lib/ruby/gems/3.0.0/gems/sigdump-0.2.4/lib/sigdump.rb:73:in `each_object'\n/opt/hostedtoolcache/Ruby/3.0.5/x64/lib/ruby/gems/3.0.0/gems/sigdump-0.2.4/lib/sigdump.rb:73:in `dump_object_count'\n/opt/hostedtoolcache/Ruby/3.0.5/x64/lib/ruby/gems/3.0\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n fluentd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluentd\nkubectl get events -n fluentd --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"CI: Some tests about signal handlers sometimes fail\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "If it use the object applied `dont_allow` in the other test through `ObjectSpace.each_object`, it will cause the error.\nTo relax object constraints, this patch will use `never` instead.\n\nSee sample code in https://github.com/fluent/fluentd/issues/4063#issuecomment-2416121325",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "===============================================================================\nFailure: test_cont_in_main_process_signal_handlers(SupervisorTest):\n  class()\n  Called 0 times.\n  Expected 1 times.\n/opt/hostedtoolcache/Ruby/3.0.5/x64/lib/ruby/gems/3.0.0/gems/sigdump-0.2.4/lib/sigdump.rb:74:in `block in dump_object_count'\n/opt/hostedtoolcache/Ruby/3.0.5/x64/lib/ruby/gems/3.0.0/gems/sigdump-0.2.4/lib/sigdump.rb:73:in `each_object'\n/opt/hostedtoolcache/Ruby/3.0.5/x64/lib/ruby/gems/3.0.0/gems/sigdump-0.2.4/lib/sigdump.rb:73:in `dump_object_count'\n/opt/hostedtoolcache/Ruby/3.0.5/x64/lib/ruby/gems/3.0.0/gems/sigdump-0.2.4/lib/sigdump.rb:18:in `block in dump'\n/opt/hostedtoolcache/Ruby/3.0.5/x64/lib/ruby/gems/3.0.0/gems/sigdump-0.2.4/lib/sigdump.rb:136:in `open'\n/opt/hostedtoolcache/Ruby/3.0.5/x64/l",
+        "Looks like that `mock(Process).kill(:WINCH, -1).never` causes this error."
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "fluentd",
+      "graduated",
+      "observability",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "fluentd"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/fluent/fluentd/issues/4063",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/fluent/fluentd",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/fluent/fluentd/pull/4671"
+    },
+    "reactions": 1,
+    "comments": 12,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with fluentd installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-26T06:32:52.731Z",

+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
